ul.li: Style existing apps with one click

section.div: DASH Lite is a free preview of DASH — the visual style builder for Splunk classic XML dashboards. Explore the Cybersecurity use case with 2 dashboards, customize colors, fonts, and logos with a live preview, and see how fast dashboard styling can be.
section.p: Building Splunk dashboards from scratch takes hours of XML editing and CSS tweaking. DASH eliminates that work entirely — you design your look visually and see the results in real time. DASH Lite lets you experience the full design workflow with the Cybersecurity use case.

ul.li: Builder — The design studio. Customize colors, fonts, logos, and backgrounds with a live preview across the Cybersecurity use case (2 dashboards: Security Posture and Network Security).

section.div: Ready for more? The full version of DASH includes 3 use cases (Cybersecurity, IT Operations, APM), 15 dashboards, app export, Gallery, style import/export, and more. Get the full version.

section.p: Explore the DASH design experience in two steps:

ol.li: Select a use case — DASH Lite includes the Cybersecurity use case with 2 dashboards (Security Posture and Network Security) featuring pre-configured panels covering common security monitoring scenarios.

Customize your style — Open the Style Manager and adjust colors, fonts, logos, and backgrounds. Every change updates the live preview instantly. Use a preset palette as a starting point, or build your own from scratch.

section.div: Tip: No data or indexes are required to use DASH Lite. All previews use self-contained sample data, so you can start designing immediately after installation.
Note: App export, Gallery, and additional use cases are available in the full version of DASH.

section.p: The Style Manager is the design control panel. It lets you adjust every visual aspect of your dashboards with real-time preview feedback.
Each color has a picker and an alpha (transparency) slider. The seven main colors control the overall look:

tr.td: Body text, labels, and axis text
Navigation bar link and label text

section.p: Tables have their own set of colors for fine-grained control over headers, rows, borders, and text.
Choose a font family and set sizes for titles (24-32px recommended), subtitles (16-20px), and body text (12-14px).

ul.li: Logo — Upload a PNG or JPG. It appears in the app navigation bar and is automatically resized for Splunk's icon requirements.
Background Image — Upload an image for the dashboard body. Use the Background Color alpha slider to control transparency over the image.

section.div: Note: App logos may require a full Splunk restart to appear. A simple reload is not always sufficient for icon/logo changes.
section.p: DASH Lite includes 2 presets to get you started:

ul.li: Dark Executive — Deep navy with gold accents, ideal for executive and board-level dashboards.
Sunset Warm — Earthy browns with warm highlights, great for a friendly, approachable look.

section.p: Select a preset to fill all 12 color fields instantly, then fine-tune individual colors to match your brand. The full version of DASH includes 10 presets.
Toggle between Greyscale (neutral tones for professional themes) and Colorized (pastel accents for vibrant themes) chart palettes.
Real-time contrast ratio badges appear next to each color pair: green Pass (4.5:1+), yellow AA Large (3:1+), or red Fail. Aim for all green.
A 0-100 score evaluates your theme across six criteria: contrast, color harmony, typography hierarchy, alpha consistency, completeness, and dark/light coherence.
Every change is tracked. Use Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y (Cmd on Mac) or the undo/redo buttons. History holds up to 50 snapshots.
Your work is auto-saved to browser local storage every 5 seconds. Closing and reopening the Builder prompts you to resume or start fresh.
DASH Lite includes the Cybersecurity use case with 2 dashboards. Navigate between dashboards using the carousel arrows or dot indicators.

ul.li: Security Posture — KPIs, trend charts, and alert summary tables
Network Security — Traffic analysis, firewall events, and connection metrics

section.p: All previews use self-contained makeresults searches — no indexes required. Production-ready CIM queries are available in the full version of DASH.
section.div: Want more use cases? The full version of DASH includes IT Operations and APM use cases, each with 5 dashboards and 30 pre-configured panels. Get the full version.

App export is available in the full version of DASH. Create complete, production-ready Splunk apps with dashboards, navigation, branding, and CSS — all matching your style. Inject styles into existing apps. Save and share designs via the Gallery. Get the full version.

ol.li: Hard-refresh the page — Ctrl+Shift+R (Windows/Linux) or Cmd+Shift+R (Mac)
Clear Splunk cache — Visit /_bump to force Splunk to re-read static assets
Reload apps — Run splunk reload apps or POST to /services/apps/local/_reload
Full restart — Run splunk restart if logos or icons are not appearing

tr.td: Run splunk restart. Logo changes require a full restart.

section.p: Use the Feedback button in the footer of any DASH Lite page to report bugs, request features, or send suggestions.
Need custom dashboards, additional use cases, or help deploying your styled apps?
section.div: We're here to help. Contact us at support@mb2analytics.com for custom work, extended use cases, or enterprise support. We'll handle the customization so you can focus on your data.

ul.li: Custom dashboards and use cases tailored to your environment
CIM mapping and query tuning for your data sources
Enterprise deployment and Splunk Cloud packaging
Brand guidelines integration and design customization

div.p: Having issues with styles not updating? Try clearing Splunk cache (bump), hard-refreshing the page, or check the Troubleshooting section.
